programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Colin Robinson gets promoted at work and his new power threatens the balance of power in the vampire house.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Nandor's old familiar from the 1970s returns to Staten Island. Guillermo leaves to serve a new master. Nadja and Lazslo revive their musical act.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: When Nandor and Laszlo are abducted by a coven of witches, the others must venture to Brooklyn to rescue them.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: As they prepare to attend an exclusive event on the vampire social calendar, the vampires try to survive without Guillermo.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Lazslo, in bat form, is captured by Staten Island Animal Control and must be rescued. Meanwhile, Nadja can no longer resist reconnecting with her reincarnated lover, Gregor.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Nadja trains Jenna on how to take her first victim, and Nandor applies for American citizenship.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Tensions run high as the vampires prepare to host the Biannual Vampire Orgy.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Nadja and Laszlo's new familiar poses problems for Guillermo, and the vampires enlist the services of a local necromancer.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires hold a seance to deal with a ghost infestation, which leads to a larger infestation.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: While the vampires fear they've been electronically cursed, Guillermo tries to thwart a deadly threat to his masters.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: After a vengeful enemy from the past appears without warning, Laszlo flees his home and goes into hiding to avoid certain death.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires offer shelter to an old nemesis who's down on his luck.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Nandor's old familiar from the 1970s returns to Staten Island. Guillermo leaves to serve a new master. Nadja and Lazslo revive their musical act.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: When Nandor and Laszlo are abducted by a coven of witches, the others must venture to Brooklyn to rescue them.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: As they prepare to attend an exclusive event on the vampire social calendar, the vampires try to survive without Guillermo.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: A forbidden artifact is used to help Nandor court a health club employee.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Justice is served, both vampirically and also in small claims court.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Nandor is persuaded to reject vampirism and pursue a healthier lifestyle.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Colin has a birthday, and a vampire says goodbye.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires return from their world travels to find their mansion on the verge of collapse, and a freakish new creature in the house.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Opening night of Nadja's vampire nightclub is threatened when the big musical guest cancels.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires endure the private school admissions interview process.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Nandor and Laszlo air out their differences on a hunting trip at an isolated cabin, Nadja has a girls' night, and Guillermo reconnects with his family for the first time in 12 years.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows

programme.desc: Guillermo has a visitor from overseas.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows

programme.desc: The vampires embark on a road trip from which they may never return.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows

programme.desc: An ancient beast escapes and threatens the existence of all vampires everywhere.

programme.title: AFL: Gold Coast v Sydney
programme.desc: After 2 straight losses, the Swans will be desperate to get their season back on track when they head north to take on the Suns.

programme.title: Open Mike Top 30: Nathan Brown
programme.desc: Mike Sheahan is one of the most respected AFL journalists in the history of the game. Take a trip down memory lane with the best interviews and stories in Open Mike Top 30.

programme.title: AFL Biggest Upsets: 1967 GF GEE v RIC
AFL Biggest Upsets: 1970 GF COL v CAR
AFL Biggest Upsets: 1972 GF RIC v CAR
programme.desc: Victory is sweet at the best of times but especially when it's against the odds, take a look at Fox Footy's biggest AFL upsets.

AFLW Mini: Round 1 GWS v ESS
programme.desc: The first ever clash between GWS and Essendon kicks off Round 1 of the AFLW season in Canberra on Saturday afternoon.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: The stockings are hung and the forges are aglow in a Christmas competition where four smiths must work their way to the judges' nice list by salvaging steel from Santa's sleigh to forge signature blades.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex gleefully records stats as Sam Campbell identifies colourful birds and Susan Wokoma discovers new reasons to value her acting training.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess," "Worst Case Scenario," "Redneck Good Times," and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess," "Worst Case Scenario," "Redneck Good Times," and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: This Police Special offers advice in Say No To Speed Kids, then asks if The Bark Is Worse Than The Bike with some hilarious road antics.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: A fierce snowstorm wreaks havoc on the remaining survivalists. One participant attempts to warm their shelter, while another struggles with their health as the weather piles on.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: A fierce snowstorm wreaks havoc on the remaining survivalists. One participant attempts to warm their shelter, while another struggles with their health as the weather piles on.

programme.desc: The stockings are hung and the forges are aglow in a Christmas competition where four smiths must work their way to the judges' nice list by salvaging steel from Santa's sleigh to forge signature blades.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Little Alex Horne suffers for his master as he is pelted with milk by Chris Ramsey and with gin by Sophie Duker.

programme.title: Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: It's the last fishing trip of the year. Christmas is just days away, as Andrew begins the final week of this deckhand trial on board Captain Frosti's Valdimar.

programme.title: Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: It's the last fishing trip of the year. Christmas is just days away, as Andrew begins the final week of this deckhand trial on board Captain Frosti's Valdimar.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: With loads needed to be hauled for their half million dollar contract, VP bosses Hugh Rowland and Vlad 'The Mad Russian' Pleskot agree to keep struggling new hire Art Burke aboard.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame makes his comeback after being in hospital. Things go from bad to worse on the Gibb River Road for Nick and Jo. Robbie and Ashleigh race the sun to deliver an oversize load on time.

programme.title: Dirty Old Cars
programme.desc: In North Carolina, Jamie transforms a mouldy Hummer into a show stunner; in Georgia, a disgusting Dodge Dakota is cleansed of years of algae, sediments and rat poop.

programme.title: Dirty Old Cars
programme.desc: In North Carolina, Jamie transforms a mouldy Hummer into a show stunner; in Georgia, a disgusting Dodge Dakota is cleansed of years of algae, sediments and rat poop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chum's temperature rises when an antique heater comes his way. Can he fire up a deal, or will he get burned?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chum's temperature rises when an antique heater comes his way. Can he fire up a deal, or will he get burned?

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Time is running out for Slick to make it home. Ross and Jerry struggle with power poles and fences. Nick and Jo can't catch a break in the remote outback. Russell McDonough dusts off his car crusher.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame makes his comeback after being in hospital. Things go from bad to worse on the Gibb River Road for Nick and Jo. Robbie and Ashleigh race the sun to deliver an oversize load on time.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: When a World War II mortar storms the shop, can Chum fire up a deal before it implodes? Then, Rick Walks the Line when deciding to buy handcuffs from an iconic prison.

The Dirty Dozen
programme.desc: Twelve American soldiers, all criminals, get a chance at redemption on a killing mission in World War II.

programme.title: The Devil's Own
programme.desc: An Irish-American cop in New York befriends an 'innocent' immigrant from Belfast. He turns out to be an IRA rebel on a terrorist mission.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: An expert rafter takes her family for a day out on the river. But when two bank robbers hijack their raft, it turns into a white-water knuckle-biter.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: After a disastrous parachute drop, Rambo is left stranded in the jungles with only his combat knife and bow and arrows to protect him.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A spy is on a mission to disprove false accusations made against him by the very government organisation that he works for.

programme.title: Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The epic story of love and adventure in a lawless land shows the complex portrayal of the most famous lawman in the Wild West.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At the Chateau Lagorce, Anna and Edward are holding their 400th wedding; Tim and Sasha are bamboozled as they try to create a bench out of the bamboo.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At the Chateau Lagorce, Anna and Edward are holding their 400th wedding; Tim and Sasha are bamboozled as they try to create a bench out of the bamboo.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj and Irita's pockets are loaded with enough cash to splurge on Devon County's treasure trove. And their minds are brimming with enthusiasm to explore the local art and culture.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj and Irita's pockets are loaded with enough cash to splurge on Devon County's treasure trove. And their minds are brimming with enthusiasm to explore the local art and culture.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a Faberge bracelet and the fleece of the sheep who changed the modern world of genetics, plus the technology that made Dolly the sheep possible.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a Faberge bracelet and the fleece of the sheep who changed the modern world of genetics, plus the technology that made Dolly the sheep possible.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp is at Stamford Meadows in Lincolnshire. Mark Stacey and Gary Pe are the experts helping the reds and blues spend 300 pounds on three items in hopes they will make a profit.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp is at Stamford Meadows in Lincolnshire. Mark Stacey and Gary Pe are the experts helping the reds and blues spend 300 pounds on three items in hopes they will make a profit.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A pub landlord has badly burnt his legs when his barbecue gas cylinder exploded. Meanwhile, a 93-year-old war veteran is rushed to Emergency after suffering breathing difficulties.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A pub landlord has badly burnt his legs when his barbecue gas cylinder exploded. Meanwhile, a 93-year-old war veteran is rushed to Emergency after suffering breathing difficulties.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: Twelve new sewers tackle shape with tie-front blouses, transform circle skirts and create dramatic pleated Made-to-Measure garments.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: Twelve new sewers tackle shape with tie-front blouses, transform circle skirts and create dramatic pleated Made-to-Measure garments.

programme.title: Celebrity Sewing Bee Festive Specials
programme.desc: Johannes Radebe, Natalie Cassidy, Rosie Ramsey and Penny Lancaster put their sewing skills to the test, creating novelty baby outfits and pop star-inspired fancy dress.

programme.title: Celebrity Sewing Bee Festive Specials
programme.desc: Johannes Radebe, Natalie Cassidy, Rosie Ramsey and Penny Lancaster put their sewing skills to the test, creating novelty baby outfits and pop star-inspired fancy dress.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Michelle & Adrian face an empty nest. She is attached to their ageing seven bedroom home, he wants a fresh start. Neale tries to revive it while Andrew searches for a new place.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Soon to be empty nesters Michelle and Adrian are at a crossroads. Michelle is emotionally tied to their ageing seven-bedroom family home while Adrian's ready to embrace a new chapter. Can Neale breathe new life into a house bursting with memories, or will Andrew convince that happiness might just be waiting in a brand new home?

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Dawn thinks her home's dysfunctional. But partner Paul loves it. While Kirstie suggests a complete overhaul, Phil has lined up a selection of alternative properties.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Dawn thinks her home's dysfunctional. But partner Paul loves it. While Kirstie suggests a complete overhaul, Phil has lined up a selection of alternative properties.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Elise and Elliot have three young kids and need to move out of Elliot's parents' house and into a home of their own. Kim and Ralph have two children under five who are bursting out of Kim's starter flat.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Elise and Elliot have three young kids and need to move out of Elliot's parents' house and into a home of their own. Kim and Ralph have two children under five who are bursting out of Kim's starter flat.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Bryce helps twins Melinda and Trudi search for their first Adelaide home. In Sydney, Veronica joins Alun and Ange, tracking a family nest in the priciest parts of town.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Bryce helps twins Melinda and Trudi search for their first Adelaide home. In Sydney, Veronica joins Alun and Ange, tracking a family nest in the priciest parts of town.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Port Douglas. Jack and Diana bought this ex-community centre with plans to turn it into two holiday homes. But they never got round to doing it and now all they have is a half renovated home.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Port Douglas. Jack and Diana bought this ex-community centre with plans to turn it into two holiday homes. But they never got round to doing it and now all they have is a half renovated home.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Sao and Chrissy are struggling with two mortgages and want to sell so they can start fresh, with their beloved pets. Can the team pull off a great makeover to entice buyers?

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Sao and Chrissy are struggling with two mortgages and want to sell so they can start fresh, with their beloved pets. Can the team pull off a great makeover to entice buyers?

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Soon to be empty nesters Michelle and Adrian are at a crossroads. Michelle is emotionally tied to their ageing seven-bedroom family home while Adrian's ready to embrace a new chapter. Can Neale breathe new life into a house bursting with memories, or will Andrew convince that happiness might just be waiting in a brand new home?

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Michelle & Adrian face an empty nest. She is attached to their ageing seven bedroom home, he wants a fresh start. Neale tries to revive it while Andrew searches for a new place.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Architectural team Joe and Hayley have spent a lifetime designing other people's high-end homes. But when they get the chance to build their own dream home, the pressure is on to create something modern and masterful.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Architectural team Joe and Hayley have spent a lifetime designing other people's high-end homes. But when they get the chance to build their own dream home, the pressure is on to create something modern and masterful.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Dawn thinks her home's dysfunctional. But partner Paul loves it. While Kirstie suggests a complete overhaul, Phil has lined up a selection of alternative properties.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Dawn thinks her home's dysfunctional. But partner Paul loves it. While Kirstie suggests a complete overhaul, Phil has lined up a selection of alternative properties.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Emma and Nigel Forde's Essex family home is looking a bit neglected. Do they sell up or call in the builders? Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer get to work trying to persuade them one way or the other.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil battle it out to convince homeowners to either sell their home or renovate. Dawn's home is dysfunctional but Paul loves it, so Kirstie gives it a complete overhaul, while Phil lines up alternatives.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: New Zealand's Best Homes
programme.desc: Phil Spencer explores some of New Zealand's most stunning and desirable homes - from luxury mountain retreats to urban architectural wonders.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: New Zealand's Best Homes
programme.desc: Phil Spencer explores some of New Zealand's most stunning and desirable homes - from luxury mountain retreats to urban architectural wonders.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Architect Ariane dreams of a home that blurs inside and out and her methods are as unconventional as her materials. Will she convince her husband it has all been worth it, and stay within a $500,000 budget?

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Architectural team Joe and Hayley have spent a lifetime designing other people's high-end homes. But when they get the chance to build their own dream home, the pressure is on to create something modern and masterful.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Port Douglas. Jack and Diana bought this ex-community centre with plans to turn it into two holiday homes. But they never got round to doing it and now all they have is a half renovated home.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Port Douglas. Jack and Diana bought this ex-community centre with plans to turn it into two holiday homes. But they never got round to doing it and now all they have is a half renovated home.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Michelle & Adrian face an empty nest. She is attached to their ageing seven bedroom home, he wants a fresh start. Neale tries to revive it while Andrew searches for a new place.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Michelle & Adrian face an empty nest. She is attached to their ageing seven bedroom home, he wants a fresh start. Neale tries to revive it while Andrew searches for a new place.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Krystyn, 75, is in A&E after a car crash with a truck; cyclist Ian has collided with a car; 84-year-old Madge has fallen at home.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A pub landlord has badly burnt his legs when his barbecue gas cylinder exploded. Meanwhile, a 93-year-old war veteran is rushed to Emergency after suffering breathing difficulties.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews are called to an unconscious child in a park, a seriously unwell man with blood in his colostomy bag, and a deaf woman with chest pains, plus have to get a diabetic, red flag sepsis patient to hospital.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews are called to an unconscious child in a park, a seriously unwell man with blood in his colostomy bag, and a deaf woman with chest pains, plus have to get a diabetic, red flag sepsis patient to hospital.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Stone Cold
programme.desc: A series of strange murders sends shivers through a quiet New England town. It's up to a hard-as-nails police chief Jesse Stone to find the psychopath behind the savage crimes.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with Marie. His plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt.

programme.title: Children of Men
programme.desc: It's 2027. There have been no births for 18 years. Humanity is doomed. Then Clive Owen discovers the key to survival, but can he protect his precious cargo?

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: The CIA's most dangerous former operative is drawn out of hiding to uncover more explosive truths about his past.

programme.title: Public Enemies
programme.desc: A charismatic and elusive bank robber marked by the FBI as America's first Public Enemy No.1 is hunted relentlessly by top FBI agents.

programme.title: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: A crackpot New York cabbie lands in trouble after his conspiracy magazine attracts the interest of shady government heavies and leads to five unexplained murders.

programme.title: Noel
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve in New York City, and with a little help from each other, five people will discover new meaning on Christmas Day.

programme.title: Noel
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve in New York City, and with a little help from each other, five people will discover new meaning on Christmas Day.

programme.title: This Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas at the Whitfield's, and they're together for the first time in years. As they endure the ups and downs, they rediscover what makes them a family.

programme.title: It's Christmas, Eve
programme.desc: A school superintendent meets a single father who works as the head of the school's bankrupt music department. As she rediscovers her passion for music, she works to save the dreams of the kids who love music.

programme.title: It's Christmas, Eve
programme.desc: A school superintendent meets a single father who works as the head of the school's bankrupt music department. As she rediscovers her passion for music, she works to save the dreams of the kids who love music.

programme.title: One Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A recently divorced mother attempts to create a perfect Christmas for her children's first time without dad, but a series of comic mishaps threaten her best-laid plans.

programme.title: The Christmas Aunt
programme.desc: Two weeks before Christmas, Rebecca Miller returns home to Tennessee to take care of her niece and nephew and ends up reconnecting with her childhood best friend.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, the Kranks decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations and to spend the dollars saved on a Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, the Kranks decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations and to spend the dollars saved on a Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. It's now up to an unlikely alliance.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Florida's coolest undercover cops hit the streets to take down a ruthless international drug cartel.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: With his CIA days behind him, Jack Ryan is on vacation when he foils an assassination attempt on the royal family. An enraged IRA splinter faction targets him and his family in revenge.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: Jack Ryan is called into action when a prominent businessman, who may be connected to Colombian drug cartels, is murdered.

programme.title: The Anarchists
programme.desc: Despite a chaotic first Anarchapulco, several attendees relocate to Mexico, joining founder Jeff Berwick's growing anarchist community.

programme.title: The Anarchists
programme.desc: Despite a chaotic first Anarchapulco, several attendees relocate to Mexico, joining founder Jeff Berwick's growing anarchist community.

programme.title: El Accidente
programme.desc: Jose is arrested, suspected of killing Maria in a hotel room.

programme.title: El Accidente
programme.desc: Jose is arrested, suspected of killing Maria in a hotel room.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The musical fallout from the night disco died, a rock God breathes life into Tina Turner's career and we explore the otherworldly occurrences in Rick Rubin's recording studio.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The musical fallout from the night disco died, a rock God breathes life into Tina Turner's career and we explore the otherworldly occurrences in Rick Rubin's recording studio.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Willie Nelson gets over on the IRS, the overlooked band that may have invented punk music and we look into the Frank Sinatra song that has spawned a dozen murders.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Dorie Sr searches for baby Mo as Strand grows increasingly paranoid.

programme.title: The Twelve
programme.desc: A cold case from 1968 is re-opened for jury consideration when a man is charged with the murder of a woman who was researching the case for a true crime novel.

programme.title: The Twelve
programme.desc: Colby has his work cut out when the wife of the accused and the ex-partner of the victim recount the events leading to Amanda Taylor's murder.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.sub-title: You Can't Take It With You: Part One
programme.desc: In the wake of discontinuing chemotherapy, Cathy starts planning for her family's future, including helping Paul find a new wife.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.sub-title: You Can't Take It With You: Part One
programme.desc: In the wake of discontinuing chemotherapy, Cathy starts planning for her family's future, including helping Paul find a new wife.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.sub-title: You Can't Take It With You: Part Two
programme.desc: In the wake of discontinuing chemotherapy, Cathy starts planning for her family's future, including helping Paul find a new wife.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.sub-title: You Can't Take It With You: Part Two

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires attend their first human Super Bowl party, while Guillermo's search for virgins uncovers a deadly threat.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Dorie Sr searches for baby Mo as Strand grows increasingly paranoid.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Dorie Sr searches for baby Mo as Strand grows increasingly paranoid.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Hannibal and Will form a bond as Will undergoes a dark transformation. Meanwhile, Margot grows concerned over her brother's violent nature; and Will agrees to be interviewed for Freddie's book.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Hannibal and Will form a bond as Will undergoes a dark transformation. Meanwhile, Margot grows concerned over her brother's violent nature; and Will agrees to be interviewed for Freddie's book.

programme.title: Mix Tape
programme.desc: In Sheffield, 1989, teenagers Daniel and Alison meet at a house party, and bond over their shared love for music. The relationship they forge that night will follow them forever.

programme.title: Mix Tape
programme.desc: In Sheffield, 1989, teenagers Daniel and Alison meet at a house party, and bond over their shared love for music. The relationship they forge that night will follow them forever.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: Adapted by Steven Moffat from the beloved novel of the same name, following the intricate and magical love story between Clare and Henry, and a marriage with a problem: time travel.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: After a rocky 'first' meeting, Henry and Clare attempt to reset with a second date, but she still struggles to rectify this version of Henry with the man she's known and loved all her life.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires attend their first human Super Bowl party, while Guillermo's search for virgins uncovers a deadly threat.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires attend their first human Super Bowl party, while Guillermo's search for virgins uncovers a deadly threat.

programme.title: The Twelve
programme.desc: A cold case from 1968 is re-opened for jury consideration when a man is charged with the murder of a woman who was researching the case for a true crime novel.

programme.title: The Twelve
programme.desc: Colby has his work cut out when the wife of the accused and the ex-partner of the victim recount the events leading to Amanda Taylor's murder.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Hannibal and Will form a bond as Will undergoes a dark transformation. Meanwhile, Margot grows concerned over her brother's violent nature; and Will agrees to be interviewed for Freddie's book.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Hannibal and Will form a bond as Will undergoes a dark transformation. Meanwhile, Margot grows concerned over her brother's violent nature; and Will agrees to be interviewed for Freddie's book.

programme.title: The Death of Bunny Munro
programme.desc: A look at the life of a sex-addict traveling salesman who uses his door-to-door beauty products to meet women.

programme.title: The Death of Bunny Munro
programme.desc: A look at the life of a sex-addict traveling salesman who uses his door-to-door beauty products to meet women.

programme.title: Mix Tape
programme.desc: In Sheffield, 1989, teenagers Daniel and Alison meet at a house party, and bond over their shared love for music. The relationship they forge that night will follow them forever.

programme.title: Mix Tape
programme.desc: In Sheffield, 1989, teenagers Daniel and Alison meet at a house party, and bond over their shared love for music. The relationship they forge that night will follow them forever.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: Adapted by Steven Moffat from the beloved novel of the same name, following the intricate and magical love story between Clare and Henry, and a marriage with a problem: time travel.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: Adapted by Steven Moffat from the beloved novel of the same name, following the intricate and magical love story between Clare and Henry, and a marriage with a problem: time travel.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: After a rocky 'first' meeting, Henry and Clare attempt to reset with a second date, but she still struggles to rectify this version of Henry with the man she's known and loved all her life.

programme.title: The Death of Bunny Munro
programme.desc: A look at the life of a sex-addict traveling salesman who uses his door-to-door beauty products to meet women.

programme.title: The Death of Bunny Munro
programme.desc: A look at the life of a sex-addict traveling salesman who uses his door-to-door beauty products to meet women.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: Adapted by Steven Moffat from the beloved novel of the same name, following the intricate and magical love story between Clare and Henry, and a marriage with a problem: time travel.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: Adapted by Steven Moffat from the beloved novel of the same name, following the intricate and magical love story between Clare and Henry, and a marriage with a problem: time travel.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: After a rocky 'first' meeting, Henry and Clare attempt to reset with a second date, but she still struggles to rectify this version of Henry with the man she's known and loved all her life.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: After a rocky 'first' meeting, Henry and Clare attempt to reset with a second date, but she still struggles to rectify this version of Henry with the man she's known and loved all her life.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Just Desserts
programme.desc: Hannah appears on TV as a guest on a televised bake-off, but someone on the show is found murdered, so Hannah helps her detective boyfriend find the killer.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Just Desserts
programme.desc: Hannah appears on TV as a guest on a televised bake-off, but someone on the show is found murdered, so Hannah helps her detective boyfriend find the killer.

programme.title: Murder She Baked: A Plum Pudding Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah is whipping up a special plum pudding for Christmas when she finds a man dead in his own office. The 12 days of Christmas are ticking along, and she's running out of time to find the murderer.

programme.title: Murder She Baked: A Plum Pudding Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah is whipping up a special plum pudding for Christmas when she finds a man dead in his own office. The 12 days of Christmas are ticking along, and she's running out of time to find the murderer.

programme.title: Christmas in Conway
programme.desc: Hoping it will be the perfect Christmas present for his wife, a man plans to construct a Ferris wheel in his backyard.

programme.title: Christmas in Conway
programme.desc: Hoping it will be the perfect Christmas present for his wife, a man plans to construct a Ferris wheel in his backyard.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: A lipsmacking delight about cooking legend Julia Child and how she inspired a frustrated office worker with a recipe for a new life.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: A lipsmacking delight about cooking legend Julia Child and how she inspired a frustrated office worker with a recipe for a new life.

programme.title: Beethoven
programme.desc: Fall in love with the big-hearted, wet-nosed star of this outrageous comedy. With nefarious dognappers hot on his heels, an adorable puppy named Beethoven adopts the unsuspecting Newton family and promptly grows up into 185 pounds of romping, drooling, disaster-prone St Bernard. George is the none-too-thrilled father whose disdain for the cuddly canine turns to loyalty after Beethoven becomes the target of unspeakable animal experimentation. Now it's up to George to save the day in this fetching adventure that's fun for the whole family.

programme.title: The Tale of Despereaux
programme.desc: An unusually brave mouse helps to restore happiness to a forlorn kingdom after making friends with a gentleman rat.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch," based on Dr. Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee appears at the door of a stressed young mother, who is trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war. But once she's arrived, Nanny McPhee discovers that the children are fighting a war of their own against two spoiled city cousins who have just moved in and refuse to leave.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: 11-year-old Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, the washed-up magician Strawn Wise, comes to look after her and agrees to take her camping to find a mythological beast known as the Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: The Colours Within
programme.desc: A girl who can see colours in people's hearts joins a band with two other people.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Young Alan Parrish sits down as a young boy to play a game with his friend, Sarah, and on a roll of the dice is mysteriously transported into the strange jungle realm of Jumanji. There he remains trapped for 26 years, until two newly orphaned children, Judy and Peter, playing in the attic of Alan's childhood home, free the now-adult Alan from the game's clutches. But to defeat Jumanji's encroaching powers, the three reluctant players must find the now-grown Sarah and band together as a makeshift family to finish the game - before it finishes them.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Brooklyn teen Miles Morales is introduced to the limitless possibilities of the Spider-Verse, where more than one can wear the mask.

programme.title: The Bad Guys
programme.desc: The Bad Guys are the most notorious criminals in the world, pulling off a lifetime of legendary heists, but can the gang of misfits pull off their biggest job yet: going good?

programme.title: The Colours Within
programme.desc: A girl who can see colours in people's hearts joins a band with two other people.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: Dog Man, part dog, part man, is on a mission to protect and serve while chasing down the feline supervillain, Petey the Cat.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: This film tells the story of the world's first family road trip. When their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home. As if patriarch Grug didn't already have enough to handle, it goes from bad to worse when they encounter an imaginative nomad named Guy. With Guy's help the Croods conquer their fear of the outside world and discover that they have exactly what it takes to survive - each other.

programme.title: Man With No Past
programme.desc: A man wakes up in a strange city with no memory. His search for answers leads to a clash with a powerful enemy, uncovering the truth about his identity.

programme.title: Half-Baked: Totally High
programme.desc: Three potheads sell a strain of magical weed to raise funds for their friend's funeral.

programme.title: Half-Baked: Totally High
programme.desc: Three potheads sell a strain of magical weed to raise funds for their friend's funeral.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July Fourth celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood. No one wants to be the grown-up of the gang.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Two men get laid off and have to become stay-at-home dads when they can't find jobs. This inspires them to open their own day-care centre.

programme.title: A Million Ways to Die in the West
A Million Ways to Die in the West
Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: When a single mother and her two kids arrive in a small town, they begin to discover their connection to the original Ghostbusters and the secret legacy their grandfather left behind.

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't believe his luck when he wins a camcorder and an all-expense paid holiday to the French Riviera. But during his journey to the south, he falls face first into a series of mishaps.

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't believe his luck when he wins a camcorder and an all-expense paid holiday to the French Riviera. But during his journey to the south, he falls face first into a series of mishaps.

programme.title: Talladega Nights
programme.desc: Racing sensation Ricky Bobby is a hero because of his "win at all costs" approach. When a French driver challenges him for the supremacy of NASCAR, Ricky must face his own demons.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Stumbling onto what could be one of the biggest crimes in years, can misfit NYPD detectives step up their game to solve the case without killing each other and destroying NYC in the process?

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Stumbling onto what could be one of the biggest crimes in years, can misfit NYPD detectives step up their game to solve the case without killing each other and destroying NYC in the process?
